title: Staten Island Borough President — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across Office of the Staten Island Borough President (BPSI) object schemas. There is almost no machine-readable source for this office — the public surface is a Weebly brochure site (statenislandusa.com) with two trivial NYC Open Data assets — so these definitions model the borough president's CHARTER functions (land use / ULURP review, community board appointments, discretionary budget, borough board resolutions) rather than reconcile existing columns. Includes the NYC geography spine and Staten Island's community-district keys.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

CommunityBoardRef.description: A Staten Island community district / community board. The borough has three: CB1 (North Shore), CB2 (Mid-Island), CB3 (South Shore).

ContactInfo.description: Contact details for a person, office, or applicant.

OfficeUnit.description: Internal unit of the Borough President's office handling the item.
enum: Office of Land Use, Planning & Infrastructure
Constituent Services / BP Assist Help Line
